diagrams.title: ODBC Architecture Layers
diagrams.description: Shows the four-layer architecture of ODBC and how data flows between components
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how ODBC enables database interoperability by translating requests between application and various DBMS

diagrams.title: View Types Classification
diagrams.description: Hierarchical classification of database views based on structure and updatability
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing different categories of views and their relationships in DBMS
